general.title: General information
general.description: Review your profile, account state and connected access methods.

providers.title: Connected providers
providers.description: Authentication providers linked to this account.

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage password access and two-factor authentication for your account.

password.title: Password
password.create_description: Create a password for this account before enabling advanced security controls.
password.change_description: Update your password and revoke other active sessions.
password.hint: Use at least 8 characters. Avoid reusing passwords from other services.

two_factor.title: Two-factor authentication
two_factor.enabled_description: Your account requires an authenticator code when signing in.
two_factor.disabled_description: Add an authenticator app to reduce account takeover risk.
two_factor.password_required: Create a password before enabling two-factor authentication.
two_factor.scan: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app.
two_factor.manual: Or enter this setup URI manually.
two_factor.backup_codes: Save these backup codes in a safe place.
